message:
fix(ops): harden NaN health check bypass and zero-threshold discovery pruning

- state.rs: estimated_fps() now returns 0.0 for non-finite frame_time_ms
  (NaN previously bypassed all health comparisons, reporting Healthy when
  degraded). health() also treats non-finite event_throughput_eps as zero
  so lag-gated rules fire correctly when telemetry produces NaN/Inf.

- discovery.rs: DiscoveryConfig::normalized() now enforces minimum 1ms for
  stale_after_ms and prune_after_ms, preventing zero-thresholds from causing
  immediate stale/prune of all instances on every poll cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
